failures.description: The agent invoked ProductCatalogSearch with invalid arguments, omitting the required item_id and replacing the provided product_id string with the invalid integer 0.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to check whether item 1096508426 for product 1808611083 has difficulty level=beginner. The required tool schema and required IDs were already available: ProductCatalogSearch needed string item_id and string product_id. At index 2, the agent prepared a malformed tool call with only {"product_id": 0}: it omitted item_id and used an integer value instead of the provided string product_id. At index 3, the tool explicitly rejected this as a SchemaError: it requires string product_id and item_id. This is not a connectivity, access, or guardrail issue. The error was not resolved later; the agent proceeded to synthesize a failure answer.
